name: all-models-patch
description: A patched Claude Code harness for real models from a local gateway.

scripts.check: node --check src/*.mjs && node --check test/*.mjs && node --check bin/all-models-patch bin/analyze-claude-contexts bin/claude-all-usage bin/generate-support-catalog bin/generate-support-pack bin/patch-claude-all-contexts bin/prepare-claude-context-env bin/prepare-release bin/verify-claude-all-runtime && zsh -n bin/claude-all bin/claude-stable bin/install-all-models-patch bin/publish-release && plutil -lint config/stable-monitor.plist >/dev/null && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json'))"
scripts.support:generate: node bin/generate-support-pack 2.1.197 ~/.local/share/claude-stable/versions/2.1.197/claude support/darwin-arm64/2.1.197.json && node bin/generate-support-pack 2.1.201 ~/.local/share/claude-stable/versions/2.1.201/claude support/darwin-arm64/2.1.201.json && node bin/generate-support-catalog
